scripts.langchain-python:install-dev: cd sdk-python && python -m pip install -e .[dev] && cd ..\integrations\langchain-python && python -m pip install -e .[dev]
scripts.lint:langchain-python: python -m ruff check integrations/langchain-python/src integrations/langchain-python/tests integrations/langchain-python/examples
scripts.test:langchain: npm --prefix sdk run build && npm --prefix integrations/langchain test
